context: Tests whether the agent clones Dawn using the correct git sequence (clone, remove .git, reinit), creates assets/custom.css, links custom.css in layout/theme.liquid right after base.css, creates a .gitignore with the required entries, applies palette.json colors to config/settings_data.json, and does NOT push automatically.

checklist.name: Dawn cloned from GitHub
checklist.description: Agent clones Dawn from https://github.com/Shopify/dawn.git (not another source) using --depth=1 flag

checklist.name: git re-init sequence
checklist.description: After cloning, agent removes the .git directory (rm -rf .git) and initializes a new git repo with git init -b main

checklist.name: Initial commit created
checklist.description: Agent creates an initial commit after staging all files (git add -A && git commit)

checklist.name: assets/custom.css created
checklist.description: assets/custom.css file exists in the working directory (or is documented as created)

checklist.name: custom.css linked in theme.liquid
checklist.description: layout/theme.liquid contains a stylesheet reference to custom.css positioned after base.css (not before, not in a random location)

checklist.name: palette colors in settings_data.json
checklist.description: config/settings_data.json reflects brand colors from inputs/palette.json (primary, secondary, or page_bg hex values appear in settings)

checklist.name: No automatic push
checklist.description: Agent does NOT run shopify theme push — instead provides the push command for the user to run manually
